summary: Russian drone operators from the "Sever" group used "Molniya" drones to destroy Ukrainian UAV control points and pursued survivors with FPV drones in Korenek, Sumy region. The "Rubikon" Center reported 11 targets destroyed on March 16, including Ukrainian personnel, FPV anti-drone operations, and a Gepard self-propelled anti-aircraft gun. A ZALA Lancet RUK crew destroyed an American M777 howitzer in the Sumy direction after detection by a Z-16 UAV. The "West" group of forces struck a Ukrainian UAV launch point in Kolodeznoe, Kharkiv region, using LMUR missiles. Russian forces also intercepted Ukrainian fixed-wing UAVs using "Yolka" air defense drones.
